name: Spam Meat Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the spam, vinegar, prepared mustard, cubed Velveeta cheese, melted butter, sugar, and catsup in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Add the minced onion to the mixture and stir to combine all ingredients evenly.
3. Place potato roll buns on a baking sheet.
4. Spread the meat spread mixture onto each bun.
5. Cover the prepared buns tightly with foil.
6. Heat at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until ready to serve.
